[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Global economy is being confronted with successive shocks at every step with convergence of energy crisis, inflation, recurring waves of pandemic and
ever-rising geopolitical issues. Every sector experiences a slowdown in demand and prices as a result of such market conditions. However, in the ship
recycling market, the offer prices from recyclers have remained supported due to extreme shortage of units available for recycling.
